entry.title: Re: How to find Process Chain Name from SM37 JOB
entry.content: Have a nice day, Savio. Thanks for the answer. I tried this way before too. The problem is that the table RSPCPROCESSLOG does not have field JOB_NAME. The field JOB_COUNT in RSPCPROCESSLOG not equel JOB_COUNT in TBTCO (SM37). I didn’t find any corresponding between this tables.

entry.title: Re: Hi team,I have a question regarding Scope Item 2YM: d...
entry.content:
Salut @Antoine.

Thank you for your question. 

Scope Item 2YM, which is the ‘Application Interface to Retrieve Payment Files’, does not require MBC (Multibank Connectivity) nor Cash Management for its implementation. However, depending on your customer's specific business requirements and processes, you may find that integrating with MBC could be the better choice as it implemented as an SAP service and requires less manual configuration efforts from the customer. MBC can streamline and simplify bank communications. I'd recommended to discuss specific needs with their SAP implementation partner or consultant to determine the best approach.

Here is an excerpt of the scope item description at Process Navigator - SAP for Me: "

This scope item provides a basic SOAP service to send outgoing payment files to the banks. This scope item does not provide direct bank communication. When the customer implements this API, they oversee the implementation project and are responsible to operate the service. The customer must run a customer-managed middle-ware to establish the connections, develop encryption mechanisms between the middle-ware and the bank on his own, and set up a third-party solution to monitor the payments.

For the inbound communication (for example, to receive bank statements), customers should use the Finance - Account Receivable Bank Statement Integration (SAP_COM_0316) communication scenario. This communication scenario is related to the Bank Integration with File Interface (1EG) scope item. This scope item will not be enhanced in future releases and is excluded from future developments. This scope item will not support additional message types such as payment status. Because of all the topics above, SAP highly recommends using SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity (16R), providing direct bank communication and an out-of-the-box service managed by SAP."

If this helped answer the question, please mark it accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Bring out your best with SAP - Register for live sessions now!
entry.content:
Unlock the expertise of top SAP professionals through live sessions.
Elevate your knowledge with specialized SAP courses and build valuable connections with peers and industry professionals.
Don't miss the opportunity and join our live sessions


SAP Business Technology Platform

  • SAP BTP Extensibility for SAP CX solutions – Kyma
    (Europe time-friendly): September 18, 12:00 p.m.– 1:30 p.m. (CET)
  • Getting Started With Development Using SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime
    (Europe time-friendly): September 27, 6:00 p.m.– 7:00 p.m. (CET)

SAP ABAP Cloud

  • Getting Started With ABAP Cloud Development 
    (America time-friendly): October 11, 12:00 p.m.– 1:00 a.m. (EST)
  • Stay certified - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud
    (Recording) 


SAP S/4HANA

  • Material Master Data in SAP S/4HANA from a Materials Management Perspective
    Asian-Pacific-Japan time-friendly): September 12, 9:00 a.m.–11:00 a.m. (SGT)
  • SAP S/4HANA Sales: Delivery and Transportation Scheduling
    (Asian-Pacific-Japan time-friendly): September 19, 10:00 a.m.–11:00 a.m.(SGT)

Please note

You can find the latest live sessions here to engage and learn with SAP experts and peers.


Never Miss an Event
Browse through the upcoming training events and benefit from the combination of expertise, experienced speakers, and the opportunity to network on innovative and current topics in the SAP world.
Browse more

entry.title: Re: SAP extends ERP cloud portfolio with "SAP ERP, private edition, option for Microsoft SQL&qu
entry.content:
@HarshilShah- happy to answer your questions.

(1) With this approach can customer delay their timeline (as of now SAP announced to migrate to S/4HANA by 31.12.2027) to move SAP S/4HANA from ECC environment?
The support timelines are bound to the product as documented in the "Product Availability Matrix" (https://support.sap.com/PAM). The "SAP ERP, private edition, option for Microsoft SQL" is no exception to these timelines. As communicated previously SAP ECC 6.0 EhP0-5 will run out of mainstream maintenance by end of 2025 and SAP ECC 6.0 EhP6-8 will run out of mainstream maintenance by end of 2027.

(2) Is there any S note published to check more information?
There is no S-Note available, but we are working on additional information that will be published soon. As always you can reach out to your local sales representative for more detailed and customer-specific help.

entry.title: Re: How to find Process Chain Name from SM37 JOB
entry.content: I can find this process manually in RSPCPROCESSLOG, because I know this chain. But I can't find the relationship between the tables. Table RSPCLOGCHAIN have not this field too. Do you have any other ideas, Savio?

entry.title: SAP CAL always same SID
entry.content:
Hi,

I have two HANA systems via SAP CAL one is licensed and the other is still in the test phase, when I want to license the other one, I get the warning that I have already licensed the system with the SID. But SAP CAL always creates the systems with the same SID. What can I do?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: in the Fressh Machine CRRuntime_64bit_13_0_22 fails t...
entry.content:
Hi RajKT

This being a technical issue I would highly recommend contacting Technical support and open a service request.  Alternatively I would suggest as it is related to SQL server you may also add to your question above in the 'managed tag' field the following so that your questions is posted within the area of :   #Microsoft SQL Server

Best, Marine

entry.title: Re: Unlocking SAP BTP: Your Guide to SAP Business Technology Platform Use Case One-Pagers

entry.title: Re: How to remove the SAP login in branded MDK app ?
entry.content:
@Sourabh1 

Could you clarify what do you meant by "app works fine"? 

Why do you want to remove the login prompt? Do you expect a user certificate based login?

entry.title: Changing of CS notification type after creation
entry.content:
As per business requirement, CS notification type is to be changed from one notification type to another notification type by using the T. Code: IW52.
Is there any option to modify the notification type after creation.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Changing of CS notification type after creation
entry.content:
It is possible to change the notification type withing the same notification category. Business function LOG_EAM_CI_7 must be active and some configuration of notification types is required. See SAP Help:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/7f05ca069f8744759f48892c6d307fab/b0e2855487f92257e10000000a44176d-34.html?locale=en-US&version=2021.latest

entry.title: Re: SAP extends ERP cloud portfolio with "SAP ERP, private edition, option for Microsoft SQL&qu
entry.content:
Thank you @ChristophZimmermann for this information. Appreciate your reply.

Regards,

Harshil Shah

entry.title: Re: How Automated Processing Rules for Bank Statement works?
entry.content:
Hi @Aswathi_Menon ,

Thanks for the blog, the details are well explained.  

I do have some questions regarding the processing rules.

1. Is there any fallback rules available for On premise users so incase if the created rules couldn't find the matching , still we are able to post all bank statement line items.

2. Is it possible to Schedule a batch job in Schedule Account receivables fiori app for the rules created under Shared rules tab ? I can see a job template called Apply Bank statement Item Processing Rule when processing the automatic jobs , but this template is not visible in the drill down list for job template in the app. What should be done to create batch jobs then ?

 

Thanks in advance 

Vijid

entry.title: SEN manager frontend degradation
entry.content:
Hello

I noticed frontend degradation in SEN manager on the tab Server Settings. It appears after the scrolling (screens attached). 

  • SEN on-premes 10.6.1
  • Apache Tomcat 9.0
  • Microsoft edge 

I have added this code to the web.xml file

<init-param> 

<param-name>fileEncoding</param-name> 

<param-value>UTF8</param-value> 

</init-param> 

but w/o results

How can I fix it?

 

thanks

entry.title: Re: Using on-premise systems in your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant
entry.content:
@vincent_pilotte, it depends on what type of provisioning systems you would use. If it is an on-premise system, then it could be used.

You can see detailed list of supported systems. For each one you can see if it is an on-premise one or not (namely from the value of property "ProxyType"): https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/supported-systems?locale=en-US

entry.title: How can I delete multiple entries in the CBO? HELP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

how can I delete multiple entries in the CBO?

I followed the steps exactly as described in this post,

How to delete multiple CBO entries - SAP Community

but unfortunately, I’m getting an error. Are there any other ways to delete the entries?

entry.title: Re: Managing Overtime Pre-approval in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: great idea. But my entry is still there if the time type " preapproval" is declined. Any Actions to consider or to avoid that?

entry.title: Will PMW replace Classic Payment Medium?
Re: Managing Overtime Pre-approval in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Once you compare Preapproval and Actual, you may find the difference. If difference =0, then good, if difference is positive then send actuals to payroll but if negative then don't send actuals to payroll

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to ignore some characters of field inside of select?
entry.content:
As written by @Tomas_Buryanek you can use a LIKE in where clause (Abap latest version) just build the operand2 from sernr (trailing and leading %, keep or remove leading zeroes?)

  • If your business rule isn't fully expressed (e.g. can SERNR also contains character and numbers) you could even use a (less maintainable) LIKE_REGEXPR function

entry.title: Re: iOS Build Failing
entry.content:
Any help please!

@Jakub_Roguski

@Sankara1

entry.title: Default BOL form for US?
entry.content:
I new to SAP, but have been working in supply chain for nearly 30 years.

I am wondering if there are default Bill of Lading forms in SAP that we can use to print our shipments if we do not own the SCM module? We will be shipping from IM and our MES system is printing the pallet, packslips. We've paid for the overlays and the consultants appear to be confused as to the purpose of a Packslip vs. BOL. Basically, it is a packslip that says, "Packslip/Bill of Lading."  No legal clauses, NMFC data, etc..  I've never seen  such a thing! I'd like to see what the default BOL looks like in SAP, so we can maybe convince the global team to use whatever module we need for shipping. A PDF or snap of the default form would be wonderful! 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Reduce WM stock without affecting FI documents
entry.content: @saikumarkatla  See my updated answer. You can use 311 movement type instead of 561. This way FI postings will be avoided.

entry.title: Re: Creation of service order using service contract
entry.content:
Hello Varun, Can a Service order or service quote also reference a sales contract? The background to my question is that we would have one contract with the customer with price agreements covering services and service parts. The same part could be sold in a straight-forward spare parts sales order without any connection to the service department, or it could be used in a service or repair order. In both case it needs to apply the same price agreement.

Can this be achieved through a single contract document, or would we need to create 2 documents: 1 sales contract, and 1 service contract with the same content for those parts that could be referenced by either?

Thank you

Patrick

entry.title: Re: FM READ_TEXT is not showing the data but the SAP standard transaction ME33L does show all the da
entry.content:
thank you very much for the answers,  I'm going to try to explain the whole problem sequence

step 1. Create Scheduling Agreement in Tx. ME31L

 

      1.1  I don't know why the system doesn't create the text in the DB table  STXH / STXHL  the very first time

      1.2  My poor Z  SAPscript doesn't find the text info.  whit FM READ_TEXT

      1.3  Standard SAP  ME33L  of course can read the text info.

step 2.   someone modify the text  in Tx. ME32L 

       2.1  this time the system  create the text in the DB  table  STXH,  STXL    the second time

       2.2  My poor Z  SAPscript  now  can read  the text info.  with  FM  READ_TEXT

       2.3  Standard SAP  ME33L  of course can read the text info.

 

step 3.   Create another Scheduling Agreement in Tx. ME31L

      3.1   Again, I don't know why the system doesn't create the text in the DB table  STXH / STXHL  this very   

              first time

      3.2  Again, My poor Z  SAPscript doesn't find the text info.  whit FM READ_TEXT

       3.3    Standard SAP  ME33L  of course can read the text info.

 

Step 4.    Again, someone modify the text  in Tx. ME32L 

     4.1    this time the system  create the text in the DB  table  STXH,  STXL     ( the second **bleep** time )

     4.2   My poor Z  SAPscript  now  can read  the text info.  with  FM  READ_TEXT

      4.3  Standard SAP  ME33L  of course always can read the text info.

 

I did think this was a system bug,   but the system,  simply can read the text info.  from memory or  from the DB table  or boths at the same time,  buy my poor Z SAPscript can't read the text info.  from buffer memory,  only from the  DB  table  ?

 

again,  any advice guys  ?

You need permission to access this page. Request access from your administrator."

entry.title: Re: Reduce WM stock without affecting FI documents

entry.title: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the item node
entry.content:
Hello

Can someone please help in identifying the below issue in my xslt ? Req is to delete complete xml node based on one child node field.

XML input:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>0000002620</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE>1001</TRANSTYPECODE>
<TRANSNUMBER>5</TRANSNUMBER>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<ITEMID>4004845460629</ITEMID>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZCO1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>1.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>0000002621</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE/>
<TRANSNUMBER>6</TRANSNUMBER>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<ITEMID>4004845460629</ITEMID>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZCO1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>1.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

 

XML output: 2nd item node should be completely deleted/rejected as TRANSTYPECODE is blank.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>0000002620</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE>1001</TRANSTYPECODE>
<TRANSNUMBER>5</TRANSNUMBER>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<ITEMID>4004845460629</ITEMID>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZCO1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>1.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

XSL code:

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:fo="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Format"
xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<xsl:output method="xml" version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<!-- Match and output only the segments meeting the specified condition -->
<xsl:template match="ns1:item[TRANSTYPECODE = '']">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<!-- Suppress output of all other segments -->
<xsl:template match="//ns1:item"/>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Create Dynamic Table for SQL String
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I was hoping you could help me in an issue I have been struggling with, how would you create a dynamic structure for an SQL string, I've been having alot of issues with returning my data to a dynamic internal table because I work on abap version 7.20 and dont have the functions/keywords DATA or VALUE, how would you create a dynamic datastructure for this insert to work?

As for why I am doing it, we want to store aset of default queries and do check ups on changes.

 

    DATA:  sql     TYPE REF TO cl_sql_statement,
           result  TYPE REF TO cl_sql_result_set,
           err     TYPE REF TO cx_sql_exception,
           cols    TYPE adbc_column_tab,
           dref    TYPE REF TO data.
    APPEND 'UNAME' TO cols.
    APPEND 'CHANGE_DAT' TO cols.
    APPEND 'AS4USER' TO cols.
    APPEND 'AS4TIME' TO cols.
    CREATE OBJECT sql.
    GET REFERENCE OF "DYNAMIC_TABLE" INTO dref.
    TRY.
        result = sql->execute_query(
         `SELECT AGR_USERS.UNAME, AGR_USERS.CHANGE_DAT, E070.AS4USER, E070.AS4TIME FROM AGR_ USERS JOIN  E070  ON AGR_USERS.UNAME = E070.AS4USER; ` ).
        result->set_param_table( itab_ref = dref
                                corresponding_fields = cols ).
        IF result->next_package( ) > 0.
          SORT result_tab BY carrid connid fldate.
          display( ).
        ENDIF.
      CATCH cx_sql_exception INTO err.
        MESSAGE err TYPE 'I' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.

entry.title: Re: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the item node
entry.content: Typo in the xsl code - condition is !=''

entry.title: Re: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the it...
entry.content:
Typo in the earlier xsl code, here is the code I have:

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:fo="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Format"
xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<xsl:output method="xml" version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<!-- Match and output only the segments meeting the specified condition -->
<xsl:template match="ns1:item[TRANSTYPECODE !='']">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<!-- Suppress output of all other segments -->
<xsl:template match="//ns1:item"/>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Error while opening a PDF created by a smartform
entry.content:
PFA.

 

Many thanks!!

entry.title: Re: Search object connector MDG_MATERIAL not found error
entry.content:
Hi Aksoy,

The reason why you are getting this error in search screen is because you are using Enterprise Search for searching Material if you really want to use Enterprise Search, then you will have to setup MDG_MATERIAL connector in ESH_COCKPIT.

If you wish to use HANA search instead of Enterprise Search, then you will have to deactivate the BAdI "BADI_SDQ_PP_SEARCH" in the following path MDGIMG - > General Settings - > Data Quality and Search - > Search and Duplicate Check - > Business Add-Ins - > BAdI: Search for Data in Reuse Active Area. 

Regards,

Khadeer

entry.title: Re: Operation Overlapping in Production order- PP
entry.content:
Hello

You have defined a minimum overlap time of 2 hours, so you need to ensure you have operations long enough to overlap. 

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Search object connector MDG_MATERIAL not found error
entry.content: Hi @khadeernawazkhan_k

entry.title: Re: Adress Endadress in SAP Script prints unexpected content
entry.content:
Please use the buttons "..." and "</>" to display your code nicely and to avoid XML interpretation issue. See how to do it here: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-post-code-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684774

/: ADDRESS PARAGRAPH AS
/: NAME &DKADR-NAME1&, &DKADR-NAME2&, &DKADR-NAME3&, &DKADR-NAME4&
/: STREET &DKADR-STRAS&
/: POBOX &DKADR-PFACH& CODE &DKADR-PSTL2&
/: CITY &DKADR-ORT01&, &DKADR-ORT02&
/: POSTCODE &DKADR-PSTLZ&
/: COUNTRY &DKADR-LAND1&
/: REGION &DKADR-REGIO&
/: FROMCOUNTRY &DKADR-INLND&
/: ADDRESSNUMBER &DKADR-ADRNR&
/: ENDADDRESS

entry.title: Where can I learn how the Drive service captures car mileage?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Capturing Car Mileage with Drive on Android learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey introduces you to how the Drive service captures car mileage and helps simplify the expense reporting process for efficient and accurate reimbursements.

Learning Objectives

  • Explain what Drive is, its features, and its benefits for mileage capture.
  • Identify the recommended phone and tablet settings for optimal use.
  • Demonstrate proficiency in capturing mileage using the different options offered by Drive.
  • Identify and follow the steps to expense car trips created with Drive. 

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content:
My colleague signed up for SAP developer/community for the first time and got "Access Denied" error after choosing user name.
How can we fix this?

Thank you,
Chaiphon

entry.title: Re: EBRR Posting Time
entry.content:
Owen,

First, thank you very much about your answer.

But what is your point of view about the following possibility:

"...ii – To change the alternative account that is set up as alternative account of the account 13711900# “WIP Unbilled Revenue”, substituting at the alternative account for the Spanish GAAP 3316000000# “WIP Unbilled Revenue” by 4850000000 as “Advance Income”..."

Many thanks in advance,

Almudena

entry.title: Re: How to bind custom field to URL Mashup in C4C?
entry.content: Hi, I have the same case, but the tutorial link no longer works, would you have an updated link?

entry.title: Re: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the item node
entry.content: Setup a template that catches the items with a blank transaction code but don't output anything and simply copy the rest.

entry.title: Re: JSON to AVRO in ABAP Program
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for checking.

I have requirement to connect to Kafka via ASAPIO from ECC. 

Currently we are able to generate json and pus to kafka, but AVRO is ideally recommended as this gives better performance.

We need to generate AVRO format in ECC or we need to convert the json to AVRO.

entry.title: Re: dump "/SAPAPO/OM_TIME_GET" in t-cde //om13
entry.content: Execute the report SLCA_INIT_FOLLOW_UP in the SAP S/4HANA system, and after it has finished successfully, execute the report /SAPAPO/OM_CREATE_LC_TABLES. This prepares liveCache for use in SAP S/4HANA and creates the database tables required for operating the liveCache. All reports are cross-client. The client in which they are executed (usually the installation client = 000) is therefore irrelevant.

entry.title: Re: Create Dynamic Table for SQL String
entry.content:
Do you have a syntax error? A runtime error? Functional bug? What are the lines for which you have an issue?

Do you want to create an internal table with a list of columns you only know at runtime? In that case, use RTTS.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements RAP Application - Partial Blank key field
entry.content: you are the best

entry.title: Re: In One Pan10liters of Oil is poured and the multiple...
entry.content:
Hello

There is a feature called Order Combination, which allows you to combine multiple orders that run in the same work center. Costs can be distributed between the different orders, and component quantity can be cumulated.

Take a look into this link for details:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/39d6d7a325d04826b95328b25fad91ab/5bcec353b677b44ce10000000a174cb4.html

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Retrieving the FCM Token on iOS
entry.content:
I've tried everything, but `Get Device Token` and `Get Firebase Device Token` do not return any values on iOS. I assume this functionality is not yet implemented since both features are still in beta.

This is critical for sending messages from a backend server to the app, so it is a dealbreaker for me. Could someone from SAP provide an estimate on when this might be fixed? If it takes too long, I may need to consider other platforms, but I would prefer to continue using SAP Build Apps, as it meets all my needs except for the missing FCM Device Token on iOS. @Sankara1 @EsmeeX @Jakub_Roguski @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: Re: default values for action parameters from function in...
entry.content:
Hi @amo_ry ,

 

I also ended up with same situation, did you get any result for this problem?

May be @Andre_Fischer  could help.

Andre - Do you know if there is another annotation for Odata V4 for setting up default values.

We do not have option to use default function as this is only available on Public Cloud.

Regards,

Anmol

entry.title: Re: 3rd Executive Value Network (EVN) for Water and Waste Water: Antwerp, October 20 – 21
entry.content: Insightful info. Thank you Miquel.

entry.title: Re: FM READ_TEXT is not showing the data but the SAP standard transaction ME33L does show all the da
entry.content: When is the Z SAPScript called? Automatically during the execution of ME31L/ME32L?

entry.title: Re: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the it...

entry.title: Unable side menu on Zebra - RF - Personas
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Is there any way to hide the side menu that appears in Slipstream Personas when the user holds the cursor in the text field on the Zebra handheld?

Thanks

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Error while opening a PDF created by a smartform
entry.content: So, you are calling something standard which does a short dump, but without code, it's impossible to help. Also, there are a few answers about TERMS_OF_PAYMENT_NOT_IN_T052. Possibly it's not exactly T052 but another table T052X or whatever? Configuration to be checked. Also check the error message sent with the exception. Last chance: debug the update task (I guess the error was also in SM13).

entry.title: Re: Announcing the Winner of "My Most Geeky Hobby” Contest
entry.content: Kudos to all who submitted their hobby and congratulations to the winners! 🎉🎉🎉

entry.title: Re: BOE 4.3 client on JBoss/Wildfly -
entry.content: Looking for info from @SAPSupport. The SAP documentation states "As of 4.3 SP2, sapjce.jar replaces certjFIPS.jar, cryptojFIPS.jar, ssljFIPS.jar, jcmFIPS.jar and cryptojce.jar." It's clear from the stackTrace posted above that the SAP class "TlsKeyMaterialKeyGenerator" is searching for "TlsKeyMaterialParameterSpec". What in SAP code is triggering this call? Where does it expect to find the sun/TlsKeyMaterialParameterSpec class? Is there a misssing jar? Should this be a default JRE or JBoss class somehwere?

entry.title: Error connecting to system using ADT on eclipse
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to connect to a customer system using Eclipse to develop but I get an error during the logon. When I try to connect the following error pops up: Logon to system <SID> failed (partner 'IP:sapgw00' not reached). I have tried to telnet the ip on the port and it responds correctly. I have tried to search online for anyone with the same problem but nothing worked for us. I am out of ideas on what could be the problem I even checked the SICF service /sap/bc/adt was on. 

Can you help me? 

I'll attach the log file with the errors generated during the logon.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: S/4 Product Compliance - NEW Dangerous Goods Manageme...
entry.content: Thanks Pablo for the response and the link! So in answer to the first question - basically the regulations for Dangerous Goods do not get regularly updated in On-Premise 2023 - this feature will only be available in 2025. I do agree with you that this is disappointing, because my client deems this feature critical - the regulations must stay up-to-date at all times. I see the benefit of this solution where it is a guided approach, improves efficiency, and auto-calculates and auto-suggests the correct dangerous goods information and labels. The benefit of this is lost if the regulations do not get updated. It sounds like we have to wait until this feature is implemented in 2025 (or use the cloud version) to make this solution useful.

entry.title: Re: Market Segments Apps showing unusual fiscal periods
entry.content:
Dear @Philipp_Huppert,

the periods of a fiscal year span across all period variants and the value help shows all of them. There are different period variants, and some have 366 periods (one period for each day).
The value help is based on CDS View I_FiscalPeriodForVariant.

The assignment of which period variant is used is linked to the company code. However, this dynamic is not built into the VDM for the value help. Here, it is statically driven by master data, based on all possible period variants in the customizing, rather than being dependent on transaction data regarding which period variants are actually used.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: S/4 Product Compliance - NEW Dangerous Goods Manageme...
entry.content: Thanks Pablo for the response and the link! It concludes that the continuous regulatory content is not available in S4HANA 2023, and that we may have to wait until 2025 (or use the cloud version, which is not possible in our scenario). My client deems it critical for regulations to be kept up-to-date, and so without this feature, I cannot see how this module can meet their purpose. This is a shame because the actual solution it's process and integration works very well. Are there absolutely no alternatives at this point? This client only works with a small amount of UN numbers. I think as a suggestion if the regulatory update feature can be delivered as a future service pack then that would be amazing. Or if the ability to configure existing regulatory-based compliance requirements ourselves would have been fantastic. Shashi.

entry.title: Re: SD - Incompletion procedure trigger before entering m...
entry.content: Why not to set this as mandatory in customer master ?  It will be a standard functionality rather looking at sale order level where you need to go for customs validation.

entry.title: Re: Default BOL form for US?
entry.content:
Hi @nonsensely 

Please see the link for delivery output type just an example to print in ERP level (IM).

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c7894a248ca14f74aca67f97528e5ad7/f01abf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

In my opinion- Always good to have BOL at ERP delivery level (ERP Outbound Delivery is must document even though you opt for SCM Module) and should have option to print from SCM module as well (optional)...you would not find default here so you need to develop the solution as new output type even though you do not use SCM module(TM/EWM)...

Default would be output type CMR1 in in LE-Transportation.

Please let us know if you have further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: 🔵 Best of SAP BW Features in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Looking forward to this session!

entry.title: Re: SD - Incompletion procedure trigger before entering m...
entry.content: I tried that but payment method is not fetched from customer master , is that standard behaviour ?

entry.title: Re: Create Dynamic Table for SQL String
entry.content:
I didnt really have one, given i was at a bit of loss, on how to proceed, but it worked with the RTTS part, but I found a blog, that I will leave here if others are interested. Thank you the point in the right direction 🙂

If i could trouble with a more precise question, is there a way to do it in a more refined way than giving it the tables like the blog did e.g:
lo_struct ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( 'AGR_USERS' ).
  lt_comp  = lo_struct->get_components( ).
  APPEND LINES OF lt_comp TO lt_tot_comp.
  lo_struct ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( 'E070' ).
  lt_comp  = lo_struct->get_components( ).
  APPEND LINES OF lt_comp TO lt_tot_comp.

 



as that adds quite alot of unused fields, can one dynamicly give it fields from existing tables? Hopefully give it the fields from the select statement?

 

https://zevolving.com/2008/09/dynamic-internal-table-creation/

entry.title: An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL (Statutory reports)
entry.content:
When downloading a document in the Statutory reports app, we get the message "An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL". 

There's a note describing exactly the same problem (3164880 - DRC - Run Statutory Reports (F1515) - An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL | SAP Knowledge Base Article)

After going through the note we're a bit uncertain if the app can handle DMS on BTP at all or if it requires content server ("the old way") ? We use DMS on BTP and we're on prem 2023. Please let me know if you have an idea... 🙂

Best regards,
Line C.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing field column widths in a Fiori Elements List Application
entry.content:
Is this a cloud application? Some annotations seem to be framework-specific. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/abencds_943223464-_anno.htm

I'm not quite sure what that means. But I doubt you can control column-widths effectively using annotations, it's so dependent on the device, browser, framework...

But it is a good question.

I changed the bot to "Unattended" and test but same result

Trigger the API from POSTMAN, and in monitioring status is running and logs also showing that my automation is started but nothing is happening.

entry.title: workitem after resubmission again in inbox
entry.content:
Hello,

we have several sap systems and clients. In one client a workitem gets back automatically in the inbox, in another client it stays in resubmission. Where or how can this behavior be changed?

entry.title: Re: How to use Performance Ratings in Compensation Eligibility Rules
entry.content:
Hello, 

Thank you @xavierlegarrec , this is a very helpful workaround!

I am trying to implement it for one of my client and I encounter an issue. My client has several performance forms showing in the Trend_OverallPotential from which I am trying to get the rating to an MDF. I understand that the latest one is the one that is taken into account by the IC job. 

I would like to be sure what performance form it is actually taking so I tryied to map the field "source" of the Trend to the MDF but it does not display the name of the form, only "Performance" or "Live Profile" which is not very helpful. 

We also thought about having a canvas report and schedule an import to the MDF in order to be able to filter the date on the right performance form. This was not successfull either because we are not able to change the column header to match the one required by the MDF. 

I am stuck there right now. 

Is any of you ever got the same issue (multiple performance forms) ? Do you have any solution you can thing about? 

Any help/insights will be much appreciated!

Thanks

entry.title: Utility supplier reaches milestone with SAP S/4HANA Utilities
entry.content:
CELESC - one of the leading and most innovative energy suppliers in Brazil - decided to transition their entire ERP and customer relationship system to the new SAP S/4HANA Utilities platform. The aim of this transition is to provide CELESC customers an even better online service by making their company processes more robust and future proof. More than 3.900 Celesc employees fulfill its public function of providing energy for development and quality of life, and so serve more than 3.3 million Brazilians with energy every day. Being on a fast-growing market (anticipated more than 7% per year until 2029) it was crucial for Celesc to choose newest technology, that enables excellent customer experience with robust growth capabilities for the company.

In line with its vision to be an efficient energy company, recognized for its level of quality and value generation, CELESC finalized the whole transition process of their legacy commercial solution within the last months. This incorporates not only the SAP Enterprise Management solution for Utilities, but also the innovative SAP S/4HANA Utilities extensions for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA. With access to the latest updates and enhancements from SAP and PROLOGA, CELESC is now able to further increase flexibility, have the highest security standards and access to cutting-edge technologies. All of this empowers the company to further innovate and provide its customers a best-in-class user experience.

“CELESC and SAP together with PROLOGA have been collaborating for many years now, becoming partners on our mission to strive for excellence.” said Mr. Leandro Dal Pizzol, CIO.  “This strategically important partnership helps CELESC to ensure future market success. With SAP S/4HANA Utilities and the Utilities extension for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA, we have a powerful tool to be an even stronger partner for our customers using state-of-the-art business processes based on future-oriented technologies.”

PROLOGA is an internationally operating IT company with decades of experience in the development, implementation and operation of software solutions for companies in the utilities and environmental service sectors. As a certified development and cooperation partner of SAP SE, PROLOGA aims to give its international customers the decisive edge in a constantly changing environment through flexibly adaptable software products.

Leveraging the keyword „digital transformation”, CELESC can now offer to its more than 3 million customers an even closer relationship. Using a mobile app, customers can review detailed contract information as well as monitor contract changes online. “We are now working with one of the most modern service-management platforms worldwide.”

 A very important building block in this system is the first integration of SAP S/4HANA Utilities extensions for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA. This solution is deeply embedded into the SAP S/4HANA Utilities customer relationship and billing system, allowing CELESC employees to read their customers meters and handing out the bill in seconds, even in offline scenarios. This saves CELESC a tremendous amount of bureaucracy, accelerates the billing process and increases end-customer satisfaction.

Another changeover benefit is the digitally and error-free transfer of meter-reading and billing information into CELESC’s customer management system without any additional effort. By that, CELESC employees can recognize changes more quickly (e.g. additional consumption) and initiate necessary steps sooner (e.g. adjusted offerings for the customer). Also, the customers will now receive the bills in more detail and so understand their energy and tax contributions at a glance.

This immediate data synchronization furthermore enables a live status monitoring for the dispatchers. Within the FIORI-App dispatchers can view each meter reader tour individually and quickly realize possible challenges from unexpected situations like traffic jams, that delay the reading process. In such cases, dispatchers can re-assign reading tasks to other meter reading team members and so ensure, customers still receive their bill in time. This shared workload ensures a significant reduction of unread meters, leading finally to a better in-time cash flow for the company.

 

Figure 1: Fiori App showing status of assigned tours, from here a dispatcher can adjust assignments in a few seconds

Thanks to the support of SAP Consulting Brazil the whole transition process went like a breeze and was finished as planned at the beginning of May 2024. With the entire system being live now for several months, CELESC is fully satisfied with their new digital meter reading and billing process.

Challenges:

Complex system landscape preventing excellent customer experience

Delays in resolving customer queries

Lack of standardization and automation

SAP Solutions:

SAP S/4HANA Utilities

SAP S/4HANA Utilities for customer engagement, enterprise edition

SAP S/4HANA Utilities extensions for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA

Why SAP:

  • Integrate & Automate:
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud combined with the SAP Utilities Core solution to integrate systems, automate processes, and unify data in line with industry best practices
  • Short ramp-Up phase
    • Workflow simplicity and usability made possible with the SAP Fiori® user experience
  • Single source of truth, with access to financial data and insights in real time

 Benefits:

15% lower TCO (Total cost of ownership) from optimized software landscape

90% faster in providing bill to customers

60% less overtime for meter readers

70% less unread meters per month due to more agile assignments

Outcomes:

Satisfied customers through excellent customer experience by new app

Increased Employee satisfaction through streamlined workflows

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content: @chaiphon - please contact community@sap.com with details on what they are trying to access for support.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BYD - HELP] CSRF token validation failed
entry.content:
From SAP:

Thank you for contacting SAP Cloud Support.

This incident has reached the Support team. We have reviewed your issue and understand that you are unable to use the SubmitForApproval Action for the EmployeeTime BO and none of the actions are available for use.

Cause :The action SubmitForApproval from EmployeeTime Business Object does not support validations in ABSL if they are created outside of an Enhancement Implementation.

Resolution :
SAP has provided a standard BADI definition which can be implemented by the partners for these types of validations. The BADI name is TIM_EMP_TIME_VALIDATION_CHECK and the corresponding enhancement spot name is ES_TIM_REC_VAL_CHK_EXT. This BADI has an interface with only one method “VALIDATE” which needs to be implemented.

This interface method has importing parameter of type TIM_EMP_TIM_VAL_CHK which in turn consists of Employee Time ROOT UUID, Action Name and Recording View type code as input parameters. These parameters will be passed from the standard SAP code to the BADI implementation whenever any action will be called on the employee’s working time confirmations.

In the BADI implementation, you need to check for the Action name that is existing on the ROOT node of the TIMX_EMPLOYEE_TIME BO (if the implemented code needs to be executed for some specific actions, in this case SUBMIT_FOR_APPROVAL) and then retrieve the ROOT and ITEM node data of TIMX_EMPLOYEE_TIME business object with the help of received Root Node UUID.

After data retrieval, the conditions need to be put to validate the entered/saved time durations. If the requirement is to raise an error message only from the ESS time sheet, then the recording view type code can be checked in the retrieved ITEM data of the BO. The error message which needs to be raised can be logged into the CHANGING parameter of the interface which in turn consists of some attributes with regards to the error message like BADI implementation name, error occurred (Yes/No), message severity, error message text etc. The SAP standard code will take care of the error handling and the error message which is received from the BADI implementation will be shown onto the UI.

For this requirement, "Enhancement Implementation" from SAP Cloud Applications Studio can be used rather than SubmitForApproval Action Validation.

I hope this serves the purpose of the incident. Please feel free to reach us if there are further questions and we are happy to help you. The incident status has been set to Solution Proposed.

 

 

 

So I checked the Enhancement Options and found:

SetEmployeeTimeItemApprover

Now need to figure out how to use this.

entry.title: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SAP MDK application
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm developing a mobile app using SAP MDK for a client POC with offline-enabled functionality. I'm using SAP CAP as backend service. However, I am encountering the following errors when accessing deep structured entities for offline capabilities:

  • "Delta download for an Offline OData client failed. AdminService.Machines.Machines is not a media entity but is used in defining request {2} which requests stream data"
  • "Failed to initialize application data service - Error- [-10340] The download failed due to an error on the server: -857 (SERVER_SYNCHRONIZATION_ERROR) ([-10225] Message: User exception: [-100036] Failed to build the Offline OData client database.)"

I am not encountering any issues with entities that do not have a deep structure.

Entity Structure:

entity Plant {
  key ID      : UUID;
      plantID : String(10);
      machine : Composition of one Machines on machine.parent = $self;
}

entity Machines {
  key ID                 : UUID;
      makerInfo          : String(200);
  key parent             : Association to Plant;
      lastService        : Date;
      inspectionComments : String(1000);
}

Hi @Jitendra_Kansal , @bill_froelich can you suggest way to resolve this issue.

 

Thank you!

Regards,

Shankar

entry.title: Is Manage Material Coverage a standalone app
entry.content:
Is there seperate tile for Manage material coverage app?

or we need to navigate to it via Monitor material coverate app?

Will it propose the rescheduling actions like MRP list or will it vary?

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SAP MDK application
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

At.te

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Process Started but automation not triggered
entry.content: Hi @Sankara1, can you help

entry.title: Need Help with Transportation Costs & Margin Calculation in SAP BYD
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We’re facing an issue in SAP BYD with handling transportation costs. We buy and resell products with transportation services, and need to calculate profit margins separately for both. However, SAP BYD’s current process is cumbersome, requiring labor allocations that aren’t relevant to our situation.

We Need a solution that allows us to:

  1. Add transportation fees directly to customer invoices.
  2. Calculate margins for both transportation fees and product sales separately.

Your help in finding a workaround would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Can the field MRP Type ( MARC-DISMM ) be maintained as optional in the Product Master ?
entry.content:
The field MRP Type ( MARC-DISMM )  is maintained as optional in the Configuration Activity Assign Fields to Field Selection Groups ( 104026 )  but the field is still mandatory in creating a material with MRP Views ( Create Material App , Manage Product Master data )

 

Can this field be set as optional entry ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can the field MRP Type ( MARC-DISMM ) be maintained a...
entry.content:
Not all fields in the Product Master can be customized through field selection as optional 

 

Fields such as description , base unit , MRP TYPE are hard coded as required and cannot be left blank

 

Please use value 'ND' No planning for MRP Type as a dummy value

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content: @thomas_jung Thanks. My colleague has just sent email. It is to access Devtoberfest Group. If you did not log in, you can see the group. Once you logged in, it became "Access denied".

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SAP MDK application
entry.content: Can you share the resulting $metadata of the CAP service?

entry.title: Hi, Can Adapt UI be restricted at user level?
entry.content: Hi, Can Adapt UI be restricted at user level?

entry.title: Re: FM READ_TEXT is not showing the data but the SAP standard transaction ME33L does show all the da
entry.content:
• If youd didn't change the default text during creation, the displayed text will be the text of the material master data.
  • When an user change the text, this text will become adopted by the purchase document and copied with the expected keys.

In Customizing you can force adoption (e.g. Define text types for item texts)

entry.title: Re: SD - Incompletion procedure trigger before entering m...
entry.content: Not in front of the system to check this.  In your case, if the Sold-To and Payer are different in sales order, then, maintain in Payer and see whether it flows to sales order

entry.title: Re: Deploy SAPUI5 app to S4HANA cloud system
entry.content: Have you tried Create an SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud ? Which I've found by using this search in the S/4HANA Cloud documenation: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD?locale=en-US&q=deploy%20ui5

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: Sap support answered my question. https://me.sap.com/notes/0003194839 . this is what i needed.
